Details: Regular trash pickup is every Tuesday and Friday.
Recycling pickup is every Wednesday. Bins must be on curb by 7AM.
Bulk trash requires a scheduled appointment online or by phone.
Park maintenance depends on the season.
The nearest facility is Montgomery Police Department - East Precinct at 2100 East South Boulevard Montgomery AL 36116. Open 24/7.
Montgomery Fire/Rescue Headquarters is located at 19 Madison Ave Montgomery AL.
To report a pothole use the 311 Service by calling 311 or downloading the Montgomery 311 app.
